# glitchtip_team (Data Source)

Reads an existing GlitchTip team by its `organization` and `slug`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "glitchtip_team" "example" {
  organization = "acme-inc"
  slug         = "backend"
}

output "team_member_count" {
  value = data.glitchtip_team.example.member_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization the team belongs to.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug identifying the team within its organization.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the team was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the team.
- `member_count` (Number) Number of members in the team.
